title: Boaz Weinstein warns of private credit’s 'financial alchemy,' says problems are multiplying by the quarter
summary_full: Saba, alongside Cox Capital Management, launched a tender offer to purchase shares in one of Blue Owl's non-traded private credit funds at a 34.9% discount.
summary_public: Saba, alongside Cox Capital Management, launched a tender offer to purchase shares in one of Blue Owl's non-traded private credit funds at a 34.9% discount.
